name: Using LINE features with the LINE URL scheme
snippet: You can open Sticker Shop, LIFF app or camera with the LINE URL scheme. The LINE URL scheme works with LINE Official Accounts too. Read more

name: Line group URL invite feature
snippet: Question now resolved. For both styles of group there is a tab to "copy link " on the "invite"button.

name: Organizing your chats with chat folders | LINE Help Center
snippet: The Chat folders feature lets you group your chats into separate folders so you can find them more easily. Read more

name: LINE Profile, the best way to express yourself
snippet: 16 Nov 2020 — Profiles are like personal billboards, where you first reveal yourself to others, and all told the feature gets about 190 million monthly page views. Read more

name: Creating a group from a multi-person chat
snippet: Click Create a group . 3. Select the friends you want to add and click Next. 4. Enter a group name, set a profile icon and then click Create. Read more

name: Group chats and multi-person chats - LINE Developers
snippet: LINE has two types of chats with multiple users: group chats and multi-person chats. The users in a group chat or multi-person chat are called members. Read more

name: About group chats | LINE Official Account Help Center
snippet: 1. Tap the account you want to configure in the Accounts list. 2. Tap Settings > Responses. 3. Under Toggle responses, turn ON Chat . Was this page helpful? Read more
